title: Update module github.com/opencontainers/selinux to v1.14.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/opencontainers/selinux](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux) | `v1.13.1` → `v1.14.1` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fselinux/v1.14.1?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fselinux/v1.13.1/v1.14.1?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/selinux (github.com/opencontainers/selinux)</summary>

### [`v1.14.1`](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/releases/tag/v1.14.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/compare/v1.14.0...v1.14.1)

This release mostly fixes label.InitLabels regression introduced in v1.14.0.

#### What's Changed

- README: rm travis, add gha badge by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​268](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/268)
- Fix label.InitLabels regression in v1.14.0; amend ReserveLabelV2 doc by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​267](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/267)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/compare/v1.14.0...v1.14.1>

### [`v1.14.0`](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/releases/tag/v1.14.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/compare/v1.13.1...v1.14.0)

This release fixes a regression in ExecLabel, bumps the minimal Go version to 1.22, and deprecates several functions in favor of improved API.

##### Fixed

- `ExecLabel` was using an incorrect path (regression in v1.13.0). ([#​253](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/253))

##### Deprecated

- `CategoryRange` is deprecated; use `SetCategoryRange` instead. ([#​262](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/262))
- `KVMContainerLabels` is deprecated; use `KVMContainerLabel` instead. ([#​262](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/262))
- `InitContainerLabels` is deprecated; use `InitContainerLabel` instead. ([#​262](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/262))
- `ReserveLabel` is deprecated; use `ReserveLabelV2` instead. ([#​262](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/262))
- `ROFileLabel` is deprecated; if you use it, open a new issue. ([#​262](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/262))
- `ContainerLabels` is deprecated, if you use it, open a new issue. ([#​262](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/262))

##### Added

- `SEUserByName`. ([#​232](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/232), [#​251](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/251))
- `CheckLabel`. ([#​250](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/250))
- `SetCategoryRange`, `KVMContainerLabel`, `InitContainerLabel`, `ReserveLabelV2`. ([#​262](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/262))

##### Changed

- Switch to Go 1.22 as the minimally supported version ([#​256](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/256))
- Update `GetDefaultContextWithLevel` to fall back to failsafe context ([#​232](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/232))
- Use math/rand/v2 rather than crypto/rand for MCS label generation ([#​257](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/257))

##### Miscellaneous

- MAINTAINERS: add Aleksa as a maintainer. ([#​243](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/243))
- Assorted CI bumps and related fixes. ([#​255](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/255))
- Remove intToMcs. ([#​259](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/259))
- Use Cut more. ([#​254](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/254))
- Simplify getSelinuxMountPoint. ([#​258](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/258))
- Simplify/remove some code. ([#​261](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/261))
- selinux: release map key when call mcsDelete. ([#​263](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/263))

#### New Contributors

- [@​capnspacehook](https://redirect.github.com/capnspacehook) made their first contribution in [#​232](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/232)
- [@​mschiff](https://redirect.github.com/mschiff) made their first contribution in [#​253](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/253)
- [@​espadolini](https://redirect.github.com/espadolini) made their first contribution in [#​257](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/257)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/compare/v1.13.1...v1.14.0>

</details>

comments.body: maybe wait for https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28653 to ensure this passes tests in podman before updating this here

> maybe wait for [containers/podman#28653](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28653) to ensure this passes tests in podman before updating this here

That looks unhappy now; then we should update the `ReserveLabel` calls here to `ReserveLabelV2`, and again test Podman.

Somehow renovate got vendoring wrong here (forgot to bump the version it in images I think).

Here's an alternative PR which should work: https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/841

> Somehow renovate got vendoring wrong here (forgot to bump the version it in images I think).

https://github.com/containers/container-libs/issues/438
